name: create_feishu_task
description: Batch creates Feishu tasks or nested subtasks. Pass an array of task items; each item has summary (required), optional description/due/members/repeat_rule/start/mode/is_milestone, optional parentTaskGuid (create under existing task), and optional subTasks (nested subtasks, multi-level). Use open_id from get_feishu_users for assignees. Min 1, max 50 top-level items; max 50 subTasks per level. Returns nested results and path-indexed errors.

parentTaskGuid.description: Parent task GUID (optional). When set, creates a subtask under this task; requires edit permission on the parent.

dueTimestamp.description: Timestamp in milliseconds since 1970-01-01 00:00:00 UTC. Example: "1675454764000".

isDueAllDay.description: Whether the time is all-day. If true, only the date part of timestamp is used.

completedAt.description: Completion timestamp in ms (optional). Omit or "0" = unfinished; set to create a completed task.

assigneeIds.description: Assignee open_ids (optional). Use open_id from get_feishu_users. Max 50.

followerIds.description: Follower open_ids (optional). Use open_id from get_feishu_users. Max 50.

mode.description: Task mode (optional): 1 = all assignees must complete, 2 = any assignee can complete. Default 2.

isMilestone.description: Whether the task is a milestone (optional). Default false.

subTasks.description: Nested subtasks (optional). Same shape as parent; supports multi-level nesting. Max 50 per level.

items.description: Task item: summary (required), optional description/due/members/subTasks etc. Use subTasks for nested subtasks.

tasks.description: Array of tasks to create (required). Each item has summary, description?, parentTaskGuid? (for subtask under existing task), subTasks? (nested subtasks). Min 1, max 50 top-level.
